scripts.db:migrate: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d jobzard_dev < db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker exec -i jobzard-postgres psql -U jobzard -d jobzard_dev < db/seeds/001_seed_dev_user.sql
scripts.db:wait: until docker exec jobzard-postgres pg_isready -U jobzard -d jobzard_dev; do sleep 1; done
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && npm run db:wait && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
